text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I could never call myself the fastest, or number
one, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll be allowed to if I win the autumn Tenno Sho...
right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Then, I can say that I'm the best at medium
distance, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is a medium-distance G1
race rich in tradition and prestige. Winning this
will make Nature a top-class runner both in name
and reality!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yup, that's it... I've said it, now there's no taking
it back!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: No need to tell me twice!
